codeReview.summary: The detail-modal feature is fully implemented according to the specification. The DetailModal component displays comprehensive coverage information including: item name, estimated value with formatted currency, color-coded coverage status badges, detailed coverage notes explaining why items are/aren't covered, policy-specific information showing what coverage applies, common claim scenarios with descriptions, and upgrade options when available. All closing mechanisms are implemented: X button with aria-label, backdrop click, and Escape key with useEffect keyboard listener. Camera feed continues with 60% opacity dimming when opened from camera view vs 50% for dashboard items. Content dynamically updates when policy changes via useMemo on coverage lookup. Focus trap is properly implemented with role='dialog', aria-modal='true', aria-labelledby, and useRef for focus management. Comprehensive test coverage with 42 tests.

summary: The detail-modal feature passes review. All expected behavior is implemented: comprehensive item information display, multiple closing mechanisms (X button, backdrop click, Escape key), proper focus trap and accessibility attributes, camera dimming behavior, and dynamic policy updates. Test coverage is comprehensive with 42 tests covering open/close behavior, content display for all coverage statuses, keyboard accessibility, policy changes, and edge cases. No blocking issues found. Code quality is high with proper React patterns and adherence to project conventions.
